title: Tales of Graces f
titleNative: テイルズ オブ グレイセス エフ
synopsis: Taking place on the planet Efinea, Tales of Graces f centers on Asbel Lhant as he seeks the strength to protect those he holds dear. Along with his childhood friends and the mysterious and innocent Sophie, he must explore the bonds of friendship as they find themselves drawn into the conflict between three kingdoms competing for dominance of the planet. (Source: Namco Bandai Games)

title: Kahan no Machi no Celine
titleNative: 河畔の町のセリーヌ
synopsis: 19th-century France, Paris. Celine, a girl who seems like she's come from the moon, is 14 years old and lacks dreams and ambitions. She doesn't even know what she wants to do with her life. After moving to the city, she coincidentally meets an old gentleman who recommends her to try job experiences. Will she be able to find herself in the transforming city of Paris?

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

The Legendary Witch is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess

title: Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life
titleRomaji: Shirobuta Kizoku desu ga Zense no Kioku ga Haeta node Hiyoko na Otouto Sodatemasu @COMIC
titleEnglish: Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother With Memories From My Past Life
titleNative: 白豚貴族ですが前世の記憶が生えたのでひよこな弟育てます@COMIC
synopsis: An empire falling to ruin: The Kio Empire. Living in that empire, is an overweight 5-year-old abandoned by his parents, Prince Ageha. Ageha has memories from a previous life of him living as a Japanese man in another world. He then encounters his younger half-brother, Regulus. Ageha had a vision that Regulus will kill him in the future over inheritance, so Ageha sets out to raise him after Regulus's mother passed. Once the sparkling and fluffy-haired Regulus cozied up to Ageha, He turned into a doting older brother before he even realized! Enjoy a fantasy story of young brothers managing their kingdom, sometimes involving the gods, as they reform it step by step to bring a better land to the next generation! (Source: MangaPlaza)

Yuzu was hoping to take advantage of entering high school to transform herself and become more fashionable. But she wasn't having any success on her own, so she asks Rika, her idol, to be her fashion guru. However... (Source: Amazon.jp, translated)

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

tags.description: Centers around cooking or food appraisal.

title: Kui-tan
titleNative: 喰いタン
synopsis: "Holmes Agency" is a private detective office known as the "Big-Eating" Detective Office. Seiya Takano, who is known for have a huge appetite, gets assigned to this office as the new leader. Ryosuke Noda and Ryoko Izumi, both also having a big appetite work under Seiya. Murder, robbery, and kidnapping—many incidents occur around them. And the three solve each of the many cases in a most surprising way—their appetite results in marvelous speculations! They eat at themurder scene. They eat on the track. They even eat dog food! They keep on eating and eating, not even listening to the witness. Everywhere they go, they eat and eat and eat! And every time after finishing, the criminal appears. KUITAN is the words "Big-Eating" and Detective combined together. "Real Gourmet" plus "Real Mystery." The big-eating detectives are on the run, solving cases from their deep knowledge about food.
synonyms: The Case Files of the Gourmand Detective

title: Excel Saga
titleNative: エクセル・サーガ
synopsis: Earnest young girls Excel and Hyatt (both codenames) hold down minimum-wage jobs to support their true avocation: trying to conquer the city of Fukuoka for the secret organization ACROSS and its dreamy dictator, Il Palazzo--a man whose dignity is such that he could never acknowledge that ACROSS consists of himself, a leaky basement, two unpaid teenage interns, and a stray dog. But society is all to blame, as creator Rikdo Koshi takes aim at everything from organized religion to public television, in a manga that makes reindeer spit blood and puts puppies on the dinner menu. (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: Dara-san of Reiwa
titleNative: 令和のダラさん
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

title: Life with an Ordinary Guy Who Reincarnated into a Total Fantasy Knockout
titleEnglish: Life with an Ordinary Guy Who Reincarnated into a Total Fantasy Knockout
titleNative: 異世界美少女受肉おじさんと
synonyms: เกิดใหม่ต่างโลก เพื่อนผมน่ารักโฮกเลยครับ
synopsis: Tachibana Hinata and Jinguji Tsukasa are two young men who have been friends since childhood. After a disaster of a singles mixer, they’re sent flying into another world by a mysterious being–and now Tachibana is a beautiful blonde girl! When Jinguji angrily demands that they be returned home and go back to normal, they get cursed, and the only way out is for them to go on a quest and defeat the demon king. But…now the two friends can’t stop thinking about how hot the other is. Will they save the world before their lifelong bromance becomes a romance? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment) Note: Ranked 19th place of Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Web Manga Category.

title: Caught by the Villain
titleNative: 악역에게 정체를 들켜버렸다
synonyms: I was discovered by the villain
反派皇子識破我的真面目
ถูกองค์ชายตัวร้ายจับได้ซะแล้ว
synopsis: A lifetime as a fencing prodigy prepared Eunha for her new role as Selena Evan, novel side character and daughter of a renowned swordsman. Life isn't actually so bad after being sucked into a fictional world, but she’s doomed to meet an untimely death if she can't escape the clutches of the villainous Prince Ignus. When Selena's twin brother, Celestine, runs away before his military conscription, she has no choice but to enlist under his name to avoid getting her entire family executed. But hiding her identity won’t be so easy once Ignus takes note of her impressive sword skills and sets his sights on turning “Sir Celestine” into his top henchman. With the threat of execution looming over her head, can Selena avoid getting caught by the villain? (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleEnglish: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Gaiden: Tensei-shitara Yamcha Datta Ken
titleNative: ドラゴンボール外伝　転生したらヤムチャだった件
synopsis: A Japanese high school student is on his way to a Dragon Ball event with a friend. Suddenly, he sees a cute girl wearing a short skirt, but when he runs over to get a closer look, he trips and gets knocked out. Upon waking up, he realizes he's turned into Yamcha from Dragon Ball. Being an avid fan of the series, he knows what lies ahead in Yamcha's future, thus he decides to take matters into his own hands, in order to change Yamcha's fate. Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: Inaho-kun wa Nise Kanojo no Hazu Nano ni
titleRomaji: Inaho-kun wa Nise Kanojo no Hazu Nano ni
titleNative: 稲穂くんは偽カノジョのはずなのに
synonyms: Inaho-kun Is Supposed to Be a Fake Sweetheart
synopsis: Shintarou Mori, a first-year high school boy, is teased by his friends for wanting to find a beautiful girlfriend and having a sparkling social life. His classmate Inaho Sawatari is regarded as the smartest and most beautiful girl in school. The two of them shouldn't have anything to do with eacher, but when they're inadvertently mistaken for a couple, Inaho proposes: "How about we pretend we're really dating?" They act like a couple in public, but it turns out the most beautiful girl in the school is actually a very cute boy...! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)

title: Nyuuyoku Yankees
titleNative: 入浴ヤンキース
synopsis: Tatsuya Matsui and Taiga Kuroda are two people who get into fights while exploring various places… but actually they are just looking for public bathhouses in search of the best soak!! (Source: Web Action, Japanese translated)

title: Isekai Maou Gokko: Maou wa Hime wo Taoshitakunai!
titleRomaji: Isekai Maou Gokko: Maou wa Hime wo Taoshitakunai!
titleNative: 異世界魔王ごっこ～魔王は姫を倒したくない！～
synopsis: Nono, an otaku girl who was reincarnated in another world as a demon lord, sees the princess of an enemy country who looks just like her favorite character...? She's the enemy, but she doesn't want to defeat her; in fact, she wants to get closer to her somehow!!! However, it seems that if she gives up being the demon lord, she will die.

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!
searchTerms: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ

title: Dorei Shoujo to Shinitagari Kyuuketsuki
titleNative: 奴隷少女と死にたがり吸血鬼
synopsis: Falsely accused of poisoning a noble, Sherry heads into the forest to escape her pursuers. There, she meets a vampire who accidentally injures her in his hunger. Feeling guilty, he tells her that he'll do anything to get her forgiveness. Seeing this as a chance to rise out of misfortune, she tells him she wishes to be his bride. She uses various means to get him to fall in love with her, but who will actually be the one to fall first?!

chapterSourceTitle: The Slave Girl and the Vampire with a Death Wish

title: Unmei wa Yaku ni Tatanai
titleNative: 運命は役に立たない
synopsis: One day, red threads appeared on the fingers of all humans worldwide. Since those bound by that thread were destined for lasting relationships, it became known as the "red thread of fate," and a new era dawned where thread-based romance became the norm. While all this was happening, a red thread suddenly appeared on the finger of the protagonist, Tsumugi, who, incidentally, just happens to despise "thread-based love".... (Source: Manga Park, translated)
